name: Cheeco Lodge (Florida Keys) White Gazpacho
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice peppers, cucumbers, and tomatoes finely. Reserve a small amount of each for garnish.
2. Mix together the buttermilk, sour cream, and lime juice in a bowl.
3. Add the diced vegetables to the buttermilk mixture.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve the gazpacho chilled, garnished with chopped cucumber, tomato, and 8 pita croutons around the edge of the soup bowl.
Pita Crutons: Cut six pieces of pita bread into eight wedges. Separate the wedges, brush each with olive oil, and toast in an oven until crisp.
